titles.en: Instructions to Ibn Abbas upon his appointment as the governor of Basra
Instructions to Ibn Abbas upon his appointment as the governor of Basra

segments: ومن وصية له (عليه السلام) لعبد الله بن العباس عند استخلافه إياه على البصرة
arabic.text: ومن وصية له (عليه السلام) لعبد الله بن العباس عند استخلافه إياه على البصرة

segments: Given to ‘Abdullāh ibn al-‘Abbās at the time of his appointment as his Governor of Baṣrah.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: Given to ‘Abdullāh ibn al-‘Abbās at the time of his appointment as his Governor of Baṣrah.

titles.en: Instructions to Ibn Abbas upon his appointment as the governor of Basra

segments: سَعِ النَّاسَ بِوَجْهِكَ وَمَجْلِسِكَ وَحُكْمِكَ، وإِيَّاكَ وَالْغَضَبَ فَإِنَّهُ طَيْرَةٌ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ.
arabic.text: سَعِ النَّاسَ بِوَجْهِكَ وَمَجْلِسِكَ وَحُكْمِكَ، وإِيَّاكَ وَالْغَضَبَ فَإِنَّهُ طَيْرَةٌ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ.

segments: Meet people with a broad face, allow them free audience and pass generous orders. Avoid anger because it is a augury of Satan.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: Meet people with a broad face, allow them free audience and pass generous orders. Avoid anger because it is a augury of Satan.

titles.en: Instructions to Ibn Abbas upon his appointment as the governor of Basra

segments: وَاعْلَمْ أَنَّ مَا قَرَّبَكَ مِنَ اللهِ يُبَاعِدُكَ مِنْ النَّارِ، وَمَا بَاعَدَكَ مِنَ اللهِ يُقَرِّبُكَ مِنَ النَّارِ.
arabic.text: وَاعْلَمْ أَنَّ مَا قَرَّبَكَ مِنَ اللهِ يُبَاعِدُكَ مِنْ النَّارِ، وَمَا بَاعَدَكَ مِنَ اللهِ يُقَرِّبُكَ مِنَ النَّارِ.

segments: Remember that whatever takes you near Allāh takes you away from the Fire (of Hell), and whatever takes you away from Allāh takes you near the Fire.
en.sayed-ali-raza.text: Remember that whatever takes you near Allāh takes you away from the Fire (of Hell), and whatever takes you away from Allāh takes you near the Fire.
